motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def appendCharacters(self, s: str, t: str) -> int:
        i, j = 0, 0
        while i < len(s) and j < len(t):
            if s[i] == t[j]:
                j += 1
            i += 1
        return len(t) - j
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n + m)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
